{{Expand}}

{{Infobox concept
| name = Ladies
| introduced = Wintersteel
}}

== Dreadgod ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|[[Sha Relliar]] stood guard with a contingent of [[Lords]] and [[Ladies]].<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c22">''Dreadgod'', chapter 22</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Concepts]]
[[Category:Dreadgod]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle concepts]]
[[Category:Titles]]
